narrative:
Cols 69-K (precinct in Franklin County) has 473 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.7 percentage points.
